anomalies: Route 7, Route 3, Mt. Moon and Route 21 tables are exact (walkthrough Crystal tables); Routes 2, 12–15, 16–18 are species-level placeholders — deepen on a re-run
Notable Crystal catches surfaced: Houndour/Murkrow (Route 7, night), Mr. Mime & Tangela (Route 21), Lanturn line (Route 21 rods), Corsola (Routes 19/20 rods)

notes: Covers the c15 loop: Route 7, Route 2, Diglett's Cave, Routes 3/4 + Mt. Moon, Routes 1/21/19/20, the eastern loop and Cycling Road.
